hero.description: Left side: Strong value proposition with gradient text. Right side: Abstract tech visual or floating UI mockup.
hero.classes: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[90vh]

services.description: Grid of cards showcasing services. Use varying spans for visual interest.

projects.description: Clean cards with large images and minimal text overlay on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 hover:border-blue-100 transition-all hover:shadow-xl group

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background or right-side visual

content_guidelines.tone: Professional but accessible. Use 'Nosotros' (We) to build trust.
key_phrases: Innovación al alcance de tu mano

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion' (or use tailwind-animate) if not present.
2. THEME: Update 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css' to match the Color Palette defined above. Ensure Primary is #2563EB.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css' or 'index.html'. Apply 'font-sans' (DM Sans) to body and 'font-heading' (Outfit) to headings.
4. STRUCTURE: Create a Single Page Application (SPA) for the main content with ID anchors (#inicio, #servicios, #nosotros, #contacto). Create a separate route for '/privacidad'.
5. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for the Contact Form (Input, Textarea, Button, Form). Customize them to match the 'rounded-full' and 'blue-600' style.
6. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the white/light-blue backgrounds. Use semantic HTML (section, article, h1-h6).
7. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use generous spacing (py-20+).
Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very large headline.
Ensure the mobile view is perfect. Stack grids to 1 column on mobile.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications on form submission.
